meta.title: AIMS v2 — Turn Every AI Skill into Your Digital Hard Asset
meta.description: Decentralised AI asset protocol. Register, protect, and monetize AI skills as on-chain digital assets with smart contract settlement.

HomePage.badge: AIMS v2.0 — Decentralized AI Asset Protocol
HomePage.heroSubtitle: 让每一项 AI 技能，都成为你的数字化硬资产
HomePage.heroDesc: Register AI models as on-chain assets with automatic IP protection. Route compute, settle via smart contracts, earn per API call — no intermediary, no counterparty risk.
HomePage.protectDesc: Every skill is secured by a multi-layer defense system — from wallet-native authentication to AI-powered infringement detection.

protectItems.title: Wallet-Native Auth
protectItems.desc: EIP-191 signature authentication. No password, no email, no registration. Your private key never leaves your wallet.

protectItems.title: On-Chain Smart Contracts
protectItems.desc: USDT escrow with rigid 1% treasury rake. Every settlement is zero-sum and verifiable on-chain — no intermediary can tamper.

protectItems.title: AI Infringement Judge
protectItems.desc: DeepSeek-powered similarity analysis detects copied skills. Frozen funds + permanent on-chain blacklist for violators.

protectItems.title: API Relay Station
protectItems.desc: All consumer traffic routes through AIMS relay. Developers never expose raw endpoints — rate limiting and key management built in.

protectItems.title: Dual Access Model
protectItems.desc: Consumers choose: bring their own API key (0% fee) or use AIMS-managed service (+5%). You earn either way.

protectItems.title: Transparent Pricing
protectItems.desc: Fixed per-call pricing set by developer. No hidden fees, no dynamic surge pricing. 5% AIMS service markup disclosed upfront.

steps.title: Connect Wallet
steps.desc: Sign once with your EIP-1193 wallet. Instant activation — no KYC, no approval process.

steps.title: Register Your Skill
steps.desc: Define model type, provider, pricing, and capabilities. Optional repo mirroring for trust and transparency.

steps.title: Deploy & Earn
steps.desc: Your skill goes live on the marketplace. Consumers route compute through AIMS relay — you earn per API call in USDT.

steps.title: Monitor & Protect
steps.desc: AI Judge continuously monitors for infringement. Smart contract escrow guarantees settlement with zero counterparty risk.

HomePage.requirementsDesc: We maintain quality and trust through transparent, developer-friendly standards.

requirements.title: Open Source Repository
requirements.desc: Provide a public GitHub/GitLab repo. We offer automatic mirroring to the AIMS ecosystem for discoverability and trust.

requirements.title: Model Transparency
requirements.desc: Declare model type, provider, context window, and capabilities. No black boxes — consumers must know what they are paying for.

requirements.title: Fair Pricing
requirements.desc: Set a fixed per-call price in USDT. No hidden tiers, no surge pricing. Consumers see the exact cost before every call.

requirements.title: API Schema
requirements.desc: Provide an OpenAPI-compatible schema documenting your skill's input/output contract. Enables automatic integration and testing.

HomePage.localDevDesc: Every skill is a complete digital asset with three monetization models: subscription, buyout, and alliance. Developer-set pricing, smart contract auto-settlement.

localDevItems.title: Subscription
localDevItems.desc: Monthly billing with team seats. Ideal for ongoing usage — predictable recurring revenue. Subscribers can cancel anytime.

localDevItems.title: Buyout
localDevItems.desc: One-time purchase, lifetime access. Smart contract escrow with 1% platform fee, 99% to developer. Perfect for high-value enterprise deals.

localDevItems.title: Alliance Distribution
localDevItems.desc: Promoter network promotes your skill while you earn 40% passive revenue. AIMS revenue sharing, promoters add their own markup.

HomePage.skillCategoriesDesc: From LLMs to code audits, image generation to speech recognition — covering the full AI spectrum

skillCategories.name: LLM Inference
skillCategories.desc: Llama, Mixtral, DeepSeek and more — streaming responses and function calling

skillCategories.name: Code & Audit
skillCategories.desc: Smart contract vulnerability detection, code generation, security auditing

skillCategories.name: Image Generation
skillCategories.desc: Stable Diffusion, DALL-E and more — high-res image generation with batch processing

skillCategories.name: Audio & TTS
skillCategories.desc: Whisper speech recognition, multilingual translation, text-to-speech synthesis

skillCategories.name: Data Processing
skillCategories.desc: ETL pipelines, data analysis, structured extraction and automated reporting

skillCategories.name: Video Processing
skillCategories.desc: Video understanding, keyframe extraction, content moderation and auto-editing

mcp.title: aims-skill MCP
mcp.desc: One unified MCP address for all AI tools. Paste into Claude Desktop, Cursor, or Codex CLI — one address, one API key, all of AIMS marketplace in your editor.
mcp.cardDesc: Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex CLI, and any MCP-compatible editor. Copy the address below and paste it into your tool's MCP config.
mcp.pathsTitle: How to Get Your API Key

pathA.title: Already Have an Account
pathA.desc: Copy your API key from the dashboard. Paste it with the MCP address above and you’re ready to go.

pathB.title: New User · No Wallet
pathB.desc: Register locally with just an email. We’ll auto-generate an API key and pre-fill your tool config. If this is a shared computer, remember to revoke the key from your account dashboard.

pathC.title: New User · Has Wallet
pathC.desc: Connect your wallet to register. Your API key is derived from your wallet signature — no extra password needed.

mcp.securityNote: On a shared or public computer? After setup, visit your dashboard to rotate your API key.

HomePage.tokenProgramDesc: Contribute your unused GPU/TPU compute tokens to the AIMS network and earn passive income. Providers stake tokens to signal capacity — consumers pay per call, you earn while idle.

tokenProgramItems.title: Stake & Earn
tokenProgramItems.desc: Stake idle compute tokens to the AIMS pool. Earn yield proportional to your contribution and uptime.

tokenProgramItems.title: Dynamic Pricing
tokenProgramItems.desc: Token prices adjust based on network demand. High-traffic periods earn higher rates automatically.

tokenProgramItems.title: No Minimum Stake
tokenProgramItems.desc: Contribute any amount. The protocol aggregates small contributors for efficient batch routing.

HomePage.marketBuilderDesc: Promote AIMS skills, onboard developers, and earn commission. Build the decentralized AI economy with us.

marketBuilderItems.title: Affiliate Rewards
marketBuilderItems.desc: Earn a percentage of platform fees for every skill you help onboard. Track referrals on-chain.

marketBuilderItems.title: Regional Ambassadors
marketBuilderItems.desc: Lead AIMS adoption in your region. Access exclusive support, marketing resources, and higher commission tiers.

marketBuilderItems.title: Skill Curators
marketBuilderItems.desc: Curate high-quality skill collections. Verified curators earn ongoing revenue share from their curated portfolios.

HomePage.trustBadge: Smart Contract Guaranteed · 1% Fixed Rake · Zero-Sum Settlement
HomePage.ctaTitle: Ready to turn your AI skill into an asset?
HomePage.ctaDesc: Connect your wallet and deploy your first skill in under 5 minutes.

footer.copyright: AIMS v2 © {year} — Decentralized AI Asset Protocol

LoginV2.title: Sign in to AIMS v2
LoginV2.subtitle: Wallet-native auth. No password, no registration, no private-key entry.
LoginV2.secureNote: 🛡 Your private key never leaves your wallet. We only ask your wallet to sign a one-time message.
LoginV2.clickToSign: Click to sign — key stays in wallet
LoginV2.qrHint: Open OKX Wallet (or MetaMask Mobile, Trust Wallet), tap the scan icon, point at this QR code.
LoginV2.noWalletError: No browser wallet detected. Install MetaMask or OKX Wallet, or use the QR option for mobile.
LoginV2.noAccountsError: No accounts found. Unlock your wallet first.
LoginV2.wcFailedError: Failed to create WalletConnect session. Is the relay reachable?
LoginV2.neverAskKey: We will never ask for your private key, seed phrase, or password.
LoginV2.installWalletDesc: No browser wallet detected. Choose an option below to get started.
LoginV2.oneTimePairing: One-time pairing. Private key stays on your phone.

meta.title: Sign In — AIMS v2
meta.description: Connect your wallet to access AIMS v2 console.

LoginPage.selectRoleDesc: Choose how you want to use AIMS
LoginPage.roleConsumerDesc: Browse marketplace, test skills, purchase AI inference services
LoginPage.roleResellerDesc: Promote alliance skills, set your own markup, earn commission + margin
LoginPage.roleChangeHint: You can switch roles later by re-logging in
LoginPage.roleDeveloperDesc: Register and monetize your AI models on the AIMS decentralized marketplace.

DashboardPage.sandboxBanner: Sandbox — {days} days {hours} hours remaining. Test environment auto-suspends on expiry.
DashboardPage.sandboxExpired: Sandbox Expired — 30-day test period has ended.
DashboardPage.sandboxPerSkillDesc: Each registered skill gets a 30-day free testing sandbox with its own endpoint.
DashboardPage.testEndpointDesc: Use this endpoint for local testing. Free for 30 days — no charges apply to sandbox calls.
DashboardPage.tokenStationEntryDesc: Manage API keys, top up balance, view token consumption.
DashboardPage.sandboxCompleteDesc: Here's a summary of your testing period. Your data and keys are preserved — upgrade to continue using AIMS.
DashboardPage.sandboxOfferDesc: First month 40% OFF — exclusive for sandbox graduates
DashboardPage.ipVaultCardDesc: Protect your AI skills with blockchain timestamp proof. Manage attestations and generate evidence packages.

meta.title: Marketplace — AIMS v2
meta.description: Browse, filter, and route AI compute tasks to decentralized workers.

MarketplacePage.title: Discover AI Skills
MarketplacePage.subtitle: Browse, filter, and route compute tasks to decentralized workers

SkillDetailPage.useMyKeyDesc: Bring your own provider API key. AIMS relays requests using your key.
SkillDetailPage.useMyKeyHint: Your key is transmitted securely and never stored by AIMS.
SkillDetailPage.useAimsServiceDesc: Pay AIMS per call. No external API key needed.
SkillDetailPage.buyNowDesc: Pay once, access forever. No recurring charges.
SkillDetailPage.subscribeDesc: Monthly subscription with {seats} seats included. Cancel anytime.
SkillDetailPage.perCallDesc: Pay per inference call. Only pay for what you use.
SkillDetailPage.buySuccessDesc: You now own perpetual access to {name}.
SkillDetailPage.subscribeSuccessDesc: You are now subscribed to {name}. Your subscription renews monthly.
SkillDetailPage.quickTestDesc: Try a single inference call directly from this page. Edit the payload below and click test.
SkillDetailPage.balanceLowDesc: Your current balance (${balance}) may not cover estimated monthly usage (~${estimatedMonthly} USDT). Top up to continue.
SkillDetailPage.mode1PurchaseDesc: Pay developer directly. 1% AIMS transaction tax applies.
SkillDetailPage.mode2PurchaseDesc: Unified token pricing via AIMS relay. Priority routing included.
SkillDetailPage.freeSkillNote: Offered via AIMS Alliance — consumer pays token fee only
SkillDetailPage.path1BuyoutDesc: One-time purchase. Token fees apply per call (AIMS 30% / Dev 70%).
SkillDetailPage.path2AllianceMarkupDesc: Via market builder. Base price split + markup 100% to reseller.
SkillDetailPage.path3PureAllianceDesc: Direct alliance purchase at base price. No markup.
SkillDetailPage.tokenFeeNote: Token fees billed separately per call
SkillDetailPage.allianceNotTestedDesc: This skill hasn't been tested under the AIMS Alliance program yet. Testing verifies latency, throughput, reliability, and security.
SkillDetailPage.fetchError: Failed to load skill. Please try again.

SettlementsPage.title: Settlement History
SettlementsPage.subtitle: All your USDT settlements on AIMS v2
SettlementsPage.zeroSumVerified: Zero-sum verified: tax + fees + developer + worker = consumer total
SettlementsPage.buyoutSplitDetail: Buyout: AIMS 1% / Dev 99% | Token: AIMS 30% / Dev 70%
SettlementsPage.allianceMarkupSplitDetail: Base: AIMS 10% / Dev 40% / Promoter 50% | Markup: Promoter 100%

AgreementsPage.title: Agreement Management
AgreementsPage.slaDesc: Create SLAs with AI skill developers for guaranteed compute resources and priority routing.
AgreementsPage.developerAutoFillHint: Select a skill first to auto-fill the developer address.
AgreementsPage.skillRefHint: Select the skill you purchased or subscribed to. The developer address is auto-populated.
AgreementsPage.newAgreementDesc: After purchasing or subscribing to a skill, create an SLA agreement with the developer for guaranteed service quality and routing priority.
AgreementsPage.slaRoutingNoteDesc: When you submit inference tasks for {skill}, the AIMS relay will prioritize your requests according to your {sla} SLA tier.

TradingPage.subscriptionDesc: Monthly subscription with team seats. Best for ongoing team usage.
TradingPage.allianceDesc: Token-based pricing with revenue sharing. AIMS 10% / Dev 40% / Promoter 50%.
TradingPage.libraryEmpty: No skills saved yet. Browse the marketplace.
TradingPage.confirmWallet: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet
TradingPage.checkoutDoneDesc: Your skills are now available in the dashboard.

ProfilePage.personalInfoDesc: This info will be visible to others when they view your skills.
ProfilePage.displayNameHint: Choose a name others will see on your skill listings.
ProfilePage.changeWalletDesc: Disconnect and reconnect with a different wallet.
ProfilePage.contactInfoDesc: Let potential buyers reach you directly.
ProfilePage.publicProfileDesc: This is how others see you on skill pages.
ProfilePage.displayPreferenceDesc: Choose how your identity appears publicly
ProfilePage.copyKeyWarning: Copy and save this key now. It will not be shown again.

meta.title: Register Skill — AIMS v2
meta.description: Deploy your AI model to the AIMS marketplace.

DeveloperRegisterPage.title: Register New Skill
DeveloperRegisterPage.subtitle: Deploy your AI model to the AIMS marketplace. All fields are editable later.
DeveloperRegisterPage.pricingHint: Fixed rate charged to consumers per inference call
DeveloperRegisterPage.modelTypeHint: What category of AI model is this skill based on?
DeveloperRegisterPage.providerHint: Which provider or framework does this skill use?
DeveloperRegisterPage.contextWindowHint: Maximum input tokens the model can process
DeveloperRegisterPage.relayInfoHint: All traffic routes through AIMS relay. AIMS adds 5% service fee.
DeveloperRegisterPage.aimsFeeNote: AIMS applies a 5% service fee. The price you set here is what consumers pay.
DeveloperRegisterPage.developerKeyDesc: Developers receive a unified AIMS API Key for testing and accessing all model providers.
DeveloperRegisterPage.getAimsKey: Request API Key from AIMS API Station →
DeveloperRegisterPage.sourceRepoHint: Link to the public repository containing your model code. Used for transparency and arbitration.
DeveloperRegisterPage.mirrorRepoHint: AIMS will fork your repository to an immutable mirror, preventing code deletion after registration.
DeveloperRegisterPage.mirrorDetailDesc: Upon registration, AIMS will clone the current HEAD of your repository to an immutable mirror. The commit hash is recorded on-chain.
DeveloperRegisterPage.pricingModelHint: Choose how consumers pay for your skill
DeveloperRegisterPage.perCallModelDesc: Charge per inference call. Best for variable usage.
DeveloperRegisterPage.buyoutModelDesc: Single payment, perpetual access. Best for high-value enterprise deals.
DeveloperRegisterPage.subscriptionModelDesc: Recurring monthly fee with seat-based licensing. Best for team/org customers.
DeveloperRegisterPage.buyoutPriceHint: One-time perpetual license fee. Consumer pays once, accesses forever.
DeveloperRegisterPage.buyoutPriceDesc: Buyer receives permanent access to this skill. No recurring charges.
DeveloperRegisterPage.subscriptionSeatsIncludedHint: Number of IPs/devices covered by the base monthly fee. Additional seats billed at same rate.
DeveloperRegisterPage.subscriptionDesc: Consumer pays monthly per seat. Cancelable with 30-day notice.
DeveloperRegisterPage.aimsTokenStationHint: Developers get a unified API key from the API Station for testing and relay access.
DeveloperRegisterPage.transactionModelHint: Choose how your skill is sold and how revenue is split
DeveloperRegisterPage.mode1Desc: You set the price, consumers pay you directly. AIMS deducts 1% transaction tax. You keep 99%.
DeveloperRegisterPage.mode2Desc: Offer your skill for free to the AIMS network. AIMS sets unified token pricing. Revenue split: AIMS 10% / Developer 40% / Promoter 50%.
DeveloperRegisterPage.mode2TokenPreview: AIMS will set token price based on model tier. Current estimate: ${price}/10K tokens.
DeveloperRegisterPage.mode2FreeNote: You offer this skill at zero cost to consumers. AIMS handles all pricing, billing, and settlement.
DeveloperRegisterPage.ipVaultDesc: Choose your IP protection level to secure your skill's code and model assets with blockchain timestamp proof.
DeveloperRegisterPage.ipVaultLevelHint: You can upgrade anytime after registration. L1 is always free.
DeveloperRegisterPage.l1BasicDesc: Code hash + metadata hash stored on-chain. Provides timestamp proof of ownership at the moment of registration.
DeveloperRegisterPage.l2ProDesc: Full code stored on IPFS/Arweave + inference logs + monthly audit report + public verification badge.
DeveloperRegisterPage.l3JudicialDesc: Multi-chain attestation + notary service + jurisdiction templates + priority arbitration access.
DeveloperRegisterPage.l1Included: L1 Basic Attestation — included free with every skill registration
DeveloperRegisterPage.ipVaultLaterNote: You can upgrade to L2 or L3 at any time from the IP Vault dashboard after registration.

ArbitrationDetailPage.dangerWarning: These actions execute irreversible on-chain transactions. Proceed with extreme caution.
ArbitrationDetailPage.counterAppealDesc: Worker may submit evidence (inference logs, computation proofs, payload diffs) within 48 hours. Evidence will be included in AI analysis for a more comprehensive judgment.
ArbitrationDetailPage.counterAppealPlaceholder: Enter your evidence: inference logs, computation proof hashes, signed payload responses, or any relevant data that demonstrates compliance.

BlacklistPage.title: Global Blacklist
BlacklistPage.subtitle: {count} addresses currently blacklisted on-chain
BlacklistPage.blacklistedDesc: This address is permanently blocked from all AIMS contracts.
BlacklistPage.cleanDesc: No restrictions found for this address.
BlacklistPage.footerNote: Blacklist additions happen via arbitration slashing. Direct add/remove requires multi-sig governance.

AdminPage.accessDeniedDesc: This admin panel is restricted to the platform owner wallet. Your current wallet is not authorized.
AdminPage.dashboardDesc: Platform overview and system health monitoring
AdminPage.apiConfigDesc: Configure external API providers for AIMS relay. Added providers become available for routing.
AdminPage.name: Name
AdminPage.weightHint: Higher weight = more traffic routed to this provider. Range 1-100.
AdminPage.transactionsDesc: View all user transactions across buyout, subscription, per-call, and alliance modes.
AdminPage.pricingDesc: Adjust relay pricing markups. Base price is the provider cost; final price = base × (1 + markup%).
AdminPage.delegationDesc: Create sections and delegate management to trusted community members. You retain final approval authority.
AdminPage.permEditDesc: Can edit and submit for review

meta.title: Reseller Console — AIMS v2
meta.description: Channel markup calculator and quote generator for AIMS market builders.

ResellerPage.title: Alliance Reseller Console
ResellerPage.desc: Promote AIMS Alliance skills and earn 25% commission on every token consumed through your referral links.
ResellerPage.noQuotes: No quotes generated yet. Select a skill and create your first quote.
ResellerPage.linkHint: Share this link with your client. It encodes your reseller ID and pre-configured pricing.
ResellerPage.noContractedSkills: No contracted skills found. Contact a skill developer to establish a reseller agreement.
ResellerPage.commissionRateDesc: You earn 25% of the AIMS platform share on every token consumed via your referral
ResellerPage.noCommissions: No commissions earned yet. Promote alliance skills to start earning passive income.
ResellerPage.earningsNote: Earnings are auto-settled on-chain every 24 hours
ResellerPage.calculatorDesc: Set your sell price above the alliance base price. Base commission + markup = your total earnings.

meta.title: API Station — AIMS v2
meta.description: AIMS API marketplace — browse categories, generate API keys with auto 10% markup, and access third-party services through AIMS relay.

ApiStationPage.title: AIMS API Station
ApiStationPage.desc: Browse API categories, generate API keys with auto 10% markup, and access third-party services through AIMS relay.
ApiStationPage.rateCardDesc: Wholesale API pricing. All services available through a single AIMS relay endpoint with auto 10% markup.
ApiStationPage.generateApiKeyDesc: Create an API key to access services through AIMS relay. Auto 10% profit markup applied.
ApiStationPage.keyLabelHint: A friendly name for this key (e.g., 'production-server-1')
ApiStationPage.apiKeyWarning: Copy and save this key now. It will not be shown again.
ApiStationPage.depositHint: Deposit USDT to your AIMS balance. Funds are used for API service access and subscription payments.
ApiStationPage.noActivity: No recent activity. Start using your API key to see usage data.
ApiStationPage.noKeys: No API keys yet. Generate one to get started.
ApiStationPage.allianceModelsDesc: APIs available through the AIMS Alliance Program with revenue sharing
ApiStationPage.ipVaultDesc: Manage your IP Vault attestation subscription fees
ApiStationPage.autoDeductNote: Fees are auto-deducted from your API Station balance on the billing date.
ApiStationPage.noIpVaultSubscriptions: No active IP Vault subscriptions. Register skills and upgrade in IP Vault.
ApiStationPage.apiCategoriesDesc: Browse APIs by category. Generate a key to get instant access with 10% auto-markup.
ApiStationPage.llmBlockDesc: OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Plug directly into Cursor, OpenAI Codex CLI, Claude Desktop (via MCP), Continue.dev, or any OpenAI SDK tool.
ApiStationPage.llmEndpointHint: Set this as your Base URL in Cursor / Codex. Endpoint accepts standard /v1/chat/completions requests.
ApiStationPage.useYourRelayKey: Use your relay API key to access this provider's models via the AIMS relay endpoint.
ApiStationPage.functionalBlockDesc: Specialized third-party APIs organized by category. Each provider issues its own API key.
ApiStationPage.apiAccessGeneratedDesc: Your key provides access with 10% markup built in. You keep the difference.
ApiStationPage.customProvidersDesc: Third-party APIs integrated by the AIMS team. Each includes auto-extracted usage documentation.

BuyPage.title: Direct Buyout
BuyPage.subtitle: Skill by {seller}
BuyPage.trialDesc: Test this skill using the unified AIMS relay endpoint. The actual models and APIs are hidden — revealed only after purchase.
BuyPage.trialEndpointDesc: Use this endpoint in Claude Code, Codex, or any AI platform. All real APIs are hidden behind this single URL.
BuyPage.purchaseDesc: Satisfied with the trial? Complete payment to receive source code and full dependency documentation.
BuyPage.purchaseSuccessDesc: You now own {skill}. Source code and dependency docs delivered.
BuyPage.noLinkId: No sell link provided. Use a valid direct-sell link.

AdminWorkersPage.title: Worker Credit Management
AdminWorkersPage.desc: Manage worker credit tiers, monitor performance metrics, and adjust tier assignments. Tier changes affect settlement reserve rates.
AdminWorkersPage.tierChangeIrreversible: This action sends an on-chain transaction and is irreversible. The new settlement reserve rate will apply immediately.

DeveloperAlliancePage.title: AIMS Alliance — Developer
DeveloperAlliancePage.subtitle: Manage your alliance skills, track earnings, and monitor market performance
DeveloperAlliancePage.allianceIntroDesc: Offer your skills to the AIMS network at unified token pricing. Revenue split: AIMS 10% / You 40% / Promoter 50%. Resellers handle distribution — you earn passively on every token consumed.
DeveloperAlliancePage.joinAllianceDesc: Your skill will be listed at the AIMS-set alliance base price. Revenue split: AIMS 10% / Dev 40% / Promoter 50%.
DeveloperAlliancePage.leaveAllianceDesc: Your skill will revert to autonomous pricing. 7-day cooling off period applies before you can re-join.
DeveloperAlliancePage.similarSkillsDesc: How similar skills are performing in the alliance program
DeveloperAlliancePage.registerDesc: Register your AI skills on the AIMS marketplace with IP protection and multiple monetization models.
DeveloperAlliancePage.marketDemandDesc: Browse open skill demands from the market — find opportunities that match your expertise.
DeveloperAlliancePage.ipVaultDesc: Choose your IP protection level to secure your skill's code and model assets with blockchain timestamp proof.
DeveloperAlliancePage.noRegisteredSkills: No skills registered yet. Create your first skill listing.
DeveloperAlliancePage.noDemands: No open demands matching your skills.

DeveloperAlliancePage.depWorkflowHint: Describe how models and APIs connect. Delivered to buyer for self-hosting.
DeveloperAlliancePage.sellLinkDesc: Share this link. Buyers trial before purchase. You earn 99%, platform 1%.
DeveloperAlliancePage.sourceRepoHint2: Upon entering the marketplace, your source code will be mirrored to the AIMS GitHub repository. GitHub only.

DeveloperAlliancePage.uploadCodeHint: Don't have a GitHub repo? Upload your packaged code (.zip/.tar.gz). We'll host it on the AIMS GitHub (aims-skill-registry).
DeveloperAlliancePage.allianceCheckboxDesc: Join the AIMS Alliance Program. Your skill is offered at unified token pricing with revenue sharing (AIMS 10% / Dev 40% / Promoter 50%).
DeveloperAlliancePage.l1BasicDesc: Code hash + metadata hash stored on-chain. Provides timestamp proof of ownership at the moment of registration.

DeveloperAlliancePage.buyoutPriceHint: One-time perpetual license fee. Consumer pays once, accesses forever.
DeveloperAlliancePage.subscriptionModelDesc: Recurring monthly fee with seat-based licensing. Best for team/org customers.

## Authentication
Uses API key passed as X-API-Key header.

## Endpoints

### GET /v1/users
Returns list of users.

### POST /v1/users
Creates a new user.

## Pricing
Free tier: 1000 requests/month. Pro: $10/month for 10000 requests.

FaqPage.title: FAQ
FaqPage.a1: AIMS (AI Marketplace & Settlement) is a decentralized protocol for registering, licensing, and monetizing AI skills. It combines an AI relay station, on-chain copyright attestation, and a multi-party settlement engine.
FaqPage.q2: How do I get an API key?
FaqPage.a2: Connect your wallet at the API Station (/api-station), click Generate Key on any model or provider card. Your key is shown once — copy it immediately.
FaqPage.a3: Register your skill through the IP Vault. The AIMS smart contract records a cryptographic fingerprint of your skill on-chain with your wallet address and a timestamp. Anyone can verify this record via /verify/{cert_id}.
FaqPage.a4: Currently AIMS contracts are deployed on Base (Coinbase L2). The relay, marketplace, and settlement services are chain-agnostic.
FaqPage.a5: Basic tier is free (1,000 relay calls/day). Pro is $29/mo (10,000 calls/day). Enterprise is custom pricing with unlimited calls. IP attestation: L1 is free, L2 is $5 one-time, L3 is $19 one-time per skill (includes 10 attestations, plus gas fees). See /pricing for details.
FaqPage.q6: Can I use my own AI provider keys?
FaqPage.a6: Currently the relay uses AIMS-managed provider pools. Bring-your-own-key support for enterprise customers is planned.
FaqPage.a7: No. Relay prompts and responses are streamed, not stored. Only metadata (model, token count, latency) is logged for billing.
FaqPage.q8: How do I become a reseller?
FaqPage.a8: Go to /reseller/alliance to register as a reseller. You can set your own markup and earn commissions on relay usage.

Web3BasicsPage.title: Web3 Basics
Web3BasicsPage.description: New to Web3? Here is what you need to know to use AIMS.
Web3BasicsPage.item0Desc: A crypto wallet is your digital identity on the blockchain. It holds your assets and signs transactions. AIMS uses your wallet address as your account — no email or password needed. Popular wallets: MetaMask, Rabby, Coinbase Wallet.
Web3BasicsPage.item1Desc: Click "Connect Wallet" on any AIMS page. Your browser wallet will ask you to confirm the connection. Once connected, your wallet address appears in the top navigation bar.
Web3BasicsPage.item2Desc: To log in, AIMS asks you to sign a message with your wallet. This proves you own the address without revealing your private key. It is like a password that cannot be stolen or phished.
Web3BasicsPage.item3Desc: A smart contract is a program that runs on the blockchain. AIMS uses smart contracts to record copyright attestations — once a skill is registered, the record is permanent and anyone can verify it.
Web3BasicsPage.item4Desc: Gas is a small fee paid to the blockchain network to process your transaction. On Base (the network AIMS uses), gas fees are typically less than $0.01. IP Vault registrations require a small gas fee.
Web3BasicsPage.item5Desc: Base is a Layer 2 blockchain built on Ethereum by Coinbase. It offers fast, low-cost transactions while inheriting Ethereum's security. AIMS contracts are deployed on Base.
Web3BasicsPage.item6Desc: To use AIMS relay and marketplace features, you only need a wallet — no tokens required. To register IP (on-chain attestation), you need a small amount of ETH on Base for gas fees (~$0.01 per registration).
Web3BasicsPage.item7Desc: The AIMS smart contracts page explains how on-chain rights confirmation works in plain language.
Web3BasicsPage.ctaLink: Read about Smart Contract Rights Confirmation →
